## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why is it needed? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## How I verified it

<!-- Commands you ran and manual checks you did. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm test -w @kaplan/backend` passes
- [ ] `npm test -w @kaplan/frontend` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:frontend` succeeds
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior (regression test for bug fixes)

<!-- Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas you're unsure about. -->
